title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MATAGANGTANG, MUNICIPALITY OF PLACER, PROVINCE OF MASBATE TO BE KNOWN AS THE MATAGANGTANG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 3036 / 97 OG No. 18, 2567 (April 30, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8936, August 22, 2000 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MATAGANGTANG, MUNICIPALITY OF PLACER, PROVINCE OF MASBATE TO BE KNOWN AS THE MATAGANGTANG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established a national high school in Barangay Matagangtang, Municipality of Placer, Province of Masbate.

SEC. 2. The Department of Education, Culture and Sports is hereby directed to take the necessary steps for the immediate establishment, operation and maintenance of the school herein provided.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.) MANUEL B. VILLAR JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act

which

originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 16, 2000

and June 8, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G.

YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved:

August

2000

(Sgd.) JOSEPH E.

ESTRADA

President of the Philippines
